assertion_results.text: Output specifies internal/product/domain/contract/ as the correct location
assertion_results.evidence: Output specifies 'internal/product/domain/contracts.go (or repository.go within domain)' — a file path within domain/, not the 'domain/contract/' subdirectory

assertion_results.text: Output states the interface must be owned by the domain layer
assertion_results.evidence: Output states the interface belongs 'in the domain layer'

assertion_results.text: Output states the infrastructure layer is responsible for implementing the interface
assertion_results.evidence: Output states: "the infrastructure layer implements it" via the Dependency Inversion Principle

assertion_results.text: Output does NOT suggest placing the interface in the infrastructure or application layer
assertion_results.evidence: Output places the interface in the domain layer only
